rewritten_requirements: The system shall provide a logbook with details about cases.
The system shall allow lawyers to upload and save documents related to their case.
The system shall contain formats of model forms.
The system shall provide links to online filing.
The system shall provide quick references of common cases.
The system shall contain detailed information about laws through e-books.
The system shall provide information about judicial exams for lawyers.
The system shall contain news updates for lawyers, blogs, and feedback.
